content.text: Bump the api image tag to v2 in the deployment.

content.content:
spec:
  containers:
    - name: api
      image: api:v1
      ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
      resources:
        limits:
          cpu: '1'
          memory: 256Mi

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: deploy/api.yaml
@@ spec:
   containers:
     - name: api
-      image: api:v1
+      image: api:v2
       ports:
         - containerPort: 8080
       resources:
         limits:
           cpu: '1'
           memory: 256Mi
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
deploy/api.yaml
